subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Upon thee be the glory of Him Whom thou seest wronged at the hands of the oppressors. They have indeed denied His station and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین علیک بهاء الحسین الذی تراه مظلوما بین ایدی الظالمین قد انکروا شانه و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
